---
title: "interpolate"
---

Interpolation routines

::: {.callout-note appearance="minimal"}
**Source:** [`fit/interpolate.py`](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/fit/interpolate.py)
:::


## API Reference

#### `interpolate_x0` {#interpolate_x0}

```python
def interpolate_x0(y0, ansatz, par, x0_guess)
```

Finds the value x0 such that ansatz(x0, par)==y0

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/fit/interpolate.py#L10){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---

#### `x0_from_xyey` {#x0_from_xyey}

```python
def x0_from_xyey(ansatz, guess: np.ndarray, y0: np.float64, x: np.ndarray, y: np.ndarray, ey: np.ndarray, maxiter=10000, method='BFGS')
```

Interpolate y(x) to x0

[View source ↗](https://github.com/simone-romiti/lattice_data_tools/blob/main/fit/interpolate.py#L22){.source-link style='font-size:0.8em;'}

---
